final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, cinematic still
Primary request: vintage film-style street portrait of a young woman leaning against a neon sign in 1990s Hong Kong
Scene/backdrop: 1990s Hong Kong street at night, dense urban alley with glowing neon signage, wet pavement reflections
Subject: young woman in a denim jacket, leaning casually against a neon sign, relaxed pose, long dark hair, natural makeup
Style/medium: 35mm film photography, vintage analog aesthetic, cinematic grain
Composition/framing: medium shot, eye-level angle, shallow depth of field, neon sign partially in foreground
Lighting/mood: soft ambient street lighting mixed with neon glow, hazy night atmosphere, nostalgic and melancholic mood
Color palette: warm amber and orange tones, cool neon pink and blue accents, muted film color grading
Materials/textures: visible film grain texture, denim fabric weave, glossy wet street surface, matte skin texture
Constraints: preserve the 1990s Hong Kong era authenticity, maintain the leaning pose against neon signage
Avoid: modern elements, clean digital look, oversaturated colors, plastic skin, watermark
